mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_fetch_record (user_id, source_id, city, start_date, end_date, data_type, file_name, file_path, record_count, fetch_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceId}, #{city}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{dataType}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{recordCount}, #{fetchDate})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.source_name, s.source_url, u.username FROM data_fetch_record r LEFT JOIN data_source s ON r.source_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_fetch_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND fetch_date = #{fetchDate}
SELECT r.*, s.source_name, s.source_url, u.username FROM data_fetch_record r LEFT JOIN data_source s ON r.source_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
